Thus ends the 36th Ch. entitled PLANETARY RAYS in Kalyana Varmas SARAVALI.
146

Chapter 37.
Panchamahapurusha Yogas
1. Sri Devakirti Raja explained the Panchamahapurusha Yogas (denoting Great Men), which 1
explain below clearly.
2. Venus, Mars, Saturn, Jupiter and Mercury remaining in their respective own Houses, or
exaltation Signs, identical with Angles, cause Malavya, Ruchaka, Sasa, Hamsa and Bhadra
Yogas, respectively. The effects thereof have been elaborately explained by the ancient
preceptors, which I briefly narrate here.
3-4. MALAVYA YOGA.
One born in Malavya Yoga will have thin (not fleshy) lips, even physique, gray complexion, thin
waist, splendour equal to that of the moon, majestic voice akin to that of a tusker, pleasant
odor of the body, piercing sight, even and white teeth, hands extending to the knees and a
longevity of seventy years.
